name: Breakout
description: Breakout is a single-player arcade game where the player controls a paddle at the bottom of the screen. The paddle's purpose is to bounce a ball upwards towards a wall of bricks arranged at the top of the screen. The ball travels in a straight line until it collides with a brick, the paddle, or one of the four screen boundaries. When the ball hits a brick, the brick disappears, and the ball rebounds. When the ball hits the paddle, the ball rebounds. If the ball reaches the bottom of the screen without being hit by the paddle, the player loses a life. The goal is to eliminate all the bricks on the screen. The game ends when all the bricks are destroyed or the player runs out of lives. The ball's angle of reflection off the paddle is determined by the location on the paddle where the ball makes contact.

controls.arrow_left: Moves the paddle to the left.
controls.arrow_right: Moves the paddle to the right.
controls.space: Launches the ball at the start of each level or after a life is lost.
